_meta.cohort_definition: natural_380_atlas/master_table.csv: genetics_normalized=genetically_human, format_type=monospecific_IgG_Fab, modality=standard (complete standard Fab rows)
_meta.note_358_vs_353_vs_357: Business label '358' is mapped to the complete atlas standard-modality fully-human IgG Fab set (typically n=357 in natural_380_atlas). The stricter antibody_meta_models slice with phase_bucket!=unknown and minimal engineering yields n=353; difference is mainly unknown-phase standard drugs still present in the atlas.
